overall.description: Gameplay footage from a Western-themed open world game showing a horse-drawn carriage navigating through the historic city of Saint Denis. The camera follows the carriage through commercial streets with tram tracks, past a moving tram, under overhead signage, and into a shaded church plaza with large oak trees. The scene features detailed period architecture including brick buildings with wrought iron balconies and dirt-cobblestone streets.

scene_state.functional_zone: main commercial street with tram tracks and overhead wires

events.description: Cornwall City Railway tram approaches from the right and crosses the path in front of the carriage
carriage slows slightly to allow the tram to pass safely

agents.ego_description: driving a horse-drawn carriage down the main commercial street, navigating around other wagons and the approaching tram

notable_agents.action: electric tram moving along tracks from right to left, crossing the carriage's path
white horse-drawn carriage moving in the opposite direction along the street

entered.detail: two-story historic building with white painted facade and company signage on the upper floor
metal railway tracks embedded in the dirt and cobblestone street surface
network of electrical wires and wooden utility poles running along the street
large wooden freight wagon with barrel cargo parked on the side of the street
green and red electric streetcar with 'Cornwall City Railway' written on the side

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide commercial street in a historic city, following a horse-drawn carriage past the 'Sailmaker & Ship Chandler' building. The carriage navigates around other wagons and slows as a green electric tram crosses the path from right to left. Overhead power lines and tram tracks dominate the street infrastructure while pedestrians walk along the wooden sidewalks.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with storefronts and sidewalk pedestrians

events.description: carriage passes the tram which is now moving along the left side of the street
carriage passes close by the camera, temporarily filling the frame with wooden wagon details

agents.ego_description: continuing down the commercial street past the tram and various storefronts, kicking up dust from the wheels

notable_agents.action: man in hat leaning against a wooden post watching the carriage pass
brown horse tied to a hitching post outside a building

entered.detail: tall brick building with arched windows and 'City of Saint Denis' signage on the roofline
three-story building with red signage reading 'Frenchbread Women' on the upper facade
stack of wooden barrels and crates outside a storefront

segments.scene_description: The carriage continues down the commercial street, passing the tram which now moves along the left side. The camera passes close by the carriage wheels, then continues past the 'City of Saint Denis' building and a man leaning against a wall. The street remains busy with scattered pedestrians and horses tied to posts.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow commercial alley with overhead signage transitioning to residential

events.description: passing under the red 'Saw Dragon Restaurant' sign spanning the street, entering a narrower tree-lined corridor
entering dappled shade from large oak trees as the street becomes more residential

agents.ego_description: navigating the narrower cobblestone street, slowing to pass under the overhead restaurant sign and through the shaded corridor

notable_agents.action: woman in a long dress and apron walking along the sidewalk near a building entrance
horse-drawn carriage approaching from the opposite direction down the narrow street

entered.detail: corner building with signage reading 'Armstrong and Price Ship Chandler' on the facade
large red rectangular sign spanning the street reading 'SAW DRAGON RESTAURANT'
massive oak trees with spreading branches beginning to shade the street ahead
gothic-style stone church with arched windows visible at the end of the street

segments.scene_description: The street narrows as the carriage passes the 'Armstrong and Price Ship Chandler' building and drives under the red 'Saw Dragon Restaurant' sign. The environment transitions from open commercial to a shaded residential corridor with large oak trees and a stone church becoming visible ahead. The lighting shifts to dappled shade as the tree canopy thickens.

scene_state.functional_zone: church plaza with historic cemetery and large shade trees

events.description: entering the open plaza area around the church with significantly more tree cover and open space
passing another carriage with two well-dressed passengers moving along the church fence

agents.ego_description: driving through the open church plaza, navigating around other carriages and pedestrians near the cemetery fence

notable_agents.action: woman in a blue dress walking across the plaza toward the church entrance
open carriage with two passengers in formal attire moving along the iron fence line

entered.detail: large brick church with gothic architecture, arched stained glass windows, and stone trim
ornate black iron fence with stone pillars surrounding the church cemetery
open dirt plaza area with scattered benches and hitching posts
wooden park bench situated under the shade of the oak trees

segments.scene_description: The carriage emerges into a wide open plaza dominated by a large brick church with an ornate iron fence. The area is heavily shaded by massive oak trees draped with Spanish moss. The camera passes other horse-drawn carriages and pedestrians in period dress as it navigates around the church grounds, with the architecture shifting from commercial to religious and the street surface becoming packed dirt.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a bustling commercial district that gradually transitions into a shaded, serene church plaza. It begins on a wide street, trailing a horse-drawn carriage past a ship chandler as a green electric tram crosses the path amidst a network of overhead power lines and tram tracks. As the carriage continues forward, the camera glides past the wheels and the City of Saint Denis building, moving through a crowd of pedestrians and horses tied to posts. The scene then narrows, passing under a red restaurant sign before the open street shifts into a residential corridor where the lighting becomes dappled under a thickening canopy of oak trees. Finally, the camera emerges from the shade into a wide open plaza, navigating around a large brick church and its ornate iron fence beneath massive trees draped in Spanish moss.
